200.description: A paginated list of the viewer's study guides

schema.description:
Paginated envelope for GET /api/me/study-guides (ASK-131).
Includes soft-deleted guides authored by the viewer.

items.description:
Row shape for GET /api/me/study-guides (ASK-131). Same fields
as StudyGuideListItemResponse plus a nullable `deleted_at` so
the viewer can see (and eventually restore) their own
soft-deleted guides. Live guides render `deleted_at: null`;
soft-deleted guides render a timestamp.

creator.description:
Compact user payload used as the `creator` of a study guide. Same
privacy floor as SectionMemberResponse -- no email, no clerk_id.
creator.title: CreatorSummary

deleted_at.description:
Null for live guides; a timestamp for soft-deleted ones.
Required + nullable so the field is always present on the
wire (the frontend can check `=== null` without worrying
about an undefined case).

items.title: MyStudyGuideSummary

schema.title: ListMyStudyGuidesResponse

schema.description: Standardized error response structure matching application error domains
schema.title: AppError

schema.description: Standardized error response structure matching application error domains
schema.title: AppError

schema.title: AppError
